Announcements

About Erasmus+ Speaking Exam

03
						December

2025

Dear Students,

For students who have passed the first stage of the Erasmus English exam, the Speaking exam will be held on 04 December 2025. Students who are eligible to take the Speaking Exam can use the link below to find out at which time and in which class they will take their exam.

Click here for the 2025 - 2026 Academic Year - Erasmus+ English Speaking Session class lists.

You can contact the Erasmus Office at

erasmus@okan.edu.tr

. We will get back to you as soon as possible. If there are any further changes in the coming days, an announcement will be made here. Please check all announcements regularly.

We wish you all the best,

Erasmus Office
